payload.body: Rechecked against the current repository. The original `AnyPayload` / generic unknown-envelope evidence no longer reproduces: V1 endpoints now use named payload schemas, `ResourceEnvelopeOf` / `CollectionEnvelopeOf`, and strict contract-backed payloads for issue create/update, view create/update, template create/update, and automation evaluation. `packages/api/test/api.test.ts` also asserts concrete OpenAPI fields and `additionalProperties: false` for these routes. Moving this to done.
